title: Cranganore Fort
tagline: Cranganore Fort — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: The Fortaleza da São Tomé, also known as Cranganore Fort or Kottapuram Fort, is situated in Kodungallur of Thrissur District in Kerala, India.
overview.description: The Fortaleza da São Tomé, also known as Cranganore Fort or Kottapuram Fort, is situated in Kodungallur of Thrissur District in Kerala, India. It was of 18 feet in thickness and was made of laterite. The stone fort was built by the Portuguese in 1523 and was named after Thomas the Apostle. The fort was enlarged in 1565 and passed into the hands of the Dutch in 1663, who destroyed the fort.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chathedom
topPlaces.description: Chathedom is a village in Ernakulam district in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Kottapuram
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Kottapuram (Latin: Kottapuramen(sis)) is a diocese located in the town of Kodungallur in the ecclesiastical province of Verapoly in India. On Saturday, 18 December 2010, Pope Benedict XVI named Joseph Karikkassery, Auxiliary Bishop of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Verapoly, as Bishop of Kottapuram.

topPlaces.name: Thuruthipuram
topPlaces.description: Thuruthipuram, also known as Chathedom Thuruthipuram, is a village on the borders of Ernakulam district and Thrissur in Paravur Taluk, Kerala, India. Situated on the Periyar River, the rainy season can prove challenging for residents, with occasional flooding of lower-lying areas.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvanchikulam Temple
topPlaces.description: Thiruvanchikulam Siva Temple (medieval Thiruvanchaikkalam Temple) is a Hindu temple situated in Kodungallur in Thrissur district of Kerala state, India. Constructed in the Kerala style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Chera period.

topPlaces.name: Keezhtali Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Keezhtali Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva situated in Kodungalloor of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India; it was one of the important temples in Chera Kingdom, being one of a complex of 108. According to folklore, sage Parashurama himself installed the idol of Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Methala
topPlaces.description: Methala is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Methala was added to Kodungallur Municipality on 11 November 2009.

topPlaces.name: Moothakunnam
topPlaces.description: Moothakunnam is a small village in the Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam district of Kerala, South India.

topPlaces.name: Paravur Synagogue
topPlaces.description: The Paravur Synagogue (Hebrew: בית הכנסת פראבור; Malayalam: പറവൂർ ജൂതപള്ളി), also known as the Parur Synagogue, is a former synagogue, located on Jewish Street in North Paravur (Parur), in the state of Kerala, India. The former synagogue is one of the largest and most complete among the Jewish synagogues in Kerala.

items.note: Chathedom is a village in Ernakulam district in Kerala, India.

The Roman Catholic Diocese of Kottapuram (Latin: Kottapuramen(sis)) is a diocese located in the town of Kodungallur in the ecclesiastical province of Verapoly in India. On Saturday, 18 December 2010, Pope Benedict XVI named Joseph Karikkassery, Auxiliary Bishop of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Verapoly, as Bishop of Kottapuram.

Thuruthipuram, also known as Chathedom Thuruthipuram, is a village on the borders of Ernakulam district and Thrissur in Paravur Taluk, Kerala, India. Situated on the Periyar River, the rainy season can prove challenging for residents, with occasional flooding of lower-lying areas.

Thiruvanchikulam Siva Temple (medieval Thiruvanchaikkalam Temple) is a Hindu temple situated in Kodungallur in Thrissur district of Kerala state, India. Constructed in the Kerala style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Chera period.

Keezhtali Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva situated in Kodungalloor of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India; it was one of the important temples in Chera Kingdom, being one of a complex of 108. According to folklore, sage Parashurama himself installed the idol of Shiva.
Methala is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Methala was added to Kodungallur Municipality on 11 November 2009.
Moothakunnam is a small village in the Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam district of Kerala, South India.

The Paravur Synagogue (Hebrew: בית הכנסת פראבור; Malayalam: പറവൂർ ജൂതപള്ളി), also known as the Parur Synagogue, is a former synagogue, located on Jewish Street in North Paravur (Parur), in the state of Kerala, India. The former synagogue is one of the largest and most complete among the Jewish synagogues in Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Cranganore Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Cranganore Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Cranganore Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Cranganore Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Cranganore Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Cranganore Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Cranganore Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Cranganore Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chathedom, Diocese of Kottapuram, Thuruthipuram, Thiruvanchikulam Temple, Keezhtali Mahadeva Temple.
